fieldDescription: How often counts refresh while paused/open trade. Lower is more responsive but can cost more CPU.
Personal-use optional feature. The clean stock-review popup does not require this.

When enabled, the Fixer's Market source can include faction-known weapons inferred from market faction weapon lists, not just weapons currently found in live market cargo. Disable if this admits secret or restricted weapons.
Compatibility setting for older saves/configs. Sector and Fixer's Market multipliers below are used by the current GUI.
Multiplier applied to buy prices in the Sector Market source. Stock is limited to weapons currently present in live sector markets.
Multiplier applied to buy prices in the Fixer's Market source. Stock is virtual and intentionally expensive.
Default sufficient-stock threshold for small-slot weapons in the stock review popup.
Default sufficient-stock threshold for medium-slot weapons in the stock review popup.
Default sufficient-stock threshold for large-slot weapons in the stock review popup.
Default sufficient-stock threshold for fighter LPCs in the stock review popup.
